2604.14934.title: XQ-MEval: A Dataset with Cross-lingual Parallel Quality for Benchmarking Translation Metrics
2604.14934.paper_summary: Automatic evaluation metrics are essential for building multilingual translation systems. The common practice of evaluating these systems is averaging metric scores across languages, yet this is suspicious since metrics may suffer from cross-lingual scoring bias, where translations of equal quality receive different scores across languages. This problem has not been systematically studied because no benchmark exists that provides parallel-quality instances across languages, and expert annotation is not realistic. In this work, we propose XQ-MEval, a semi-automatically built dataset covering nine translation directions, to benchmark translation metrics. Specifically, we inject MQM-defined errors into gold translations automatically, filter them by native speakers for reliability, and merge errors to generate pseudo translations with controllable quality. These pseudo translations are then paired with corresponding sources and references to form triplets used in assessing the qualities of translation metrics. Using XQ-MEval, our experiments on nine representative metrics reveal the inconsistency between averaging and human judgment and provide the first empirical evidence of cross-lingual scoring bias. Finally, we propose a normalization strategy derived from XQ-MEval that aligns score distributions across languages, improving the fairness and reliability of multilingual metric evaluation.
2604.14934.paper_summary_zh: 自動評估指標對於建立多語言翻譯系統至關重要。評估這些系統的常見做法是對各語言的指標分數進行平均，然而這是可疑的，因為指標可能會受到跨語言評分偏差的影響，即相同質量的翻譯在不同語言中獲得不同的分數。這個問題尚未被系統地研究，因為目前沒有提供跨語言平行質量實例的基準，且專家標註並不現實。在這項工作中，我們提出了XQ-MEval，一個半自動構建的數據集，涵蓋九個翻譯方向，用於基準翻譯指標。具體而言，我們自動將MQM定義的錯誤注入到黃金翻譯中，並由母語人士進行篩選以確保可靠性，然後合併錯誤以生成具有可控質量的偽翻譯。這些偽翻譯隨後與相應的來源和參考配對，以形成用於評估翻譯指標質量的三元組。使用XQ-MEval，我們對九個代表性指標的實驗揭示了平均值與人類判斷之間的不一致性，並提供了跨語言評分偏差的首個實證證據。最後，我們提出了一種源自XQ-MEval的正規化策略，以對齊各語言之間的分數分佈，從而提高多語言指標評估的公平性和可靠性。
2604.14934.author: Jingxuan Liu et.al.
2604.14934.authors: Jingxuan Liu, Zhi Qu, Jin Tei, Hidetaka Kamigaito, Lemao Liu, Taro Watanabe
